incidents.description: Forty-second wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 13 (March 12), overnight into Wednesday. IRGC announced its 'most intense and heaviest operation' since the start of the war. Multiple ballistic missile salvos fired at Israel throughout the night, triggering sirens in central Israel at approximately 11:30 PM (March 11), 12:50 AM, 3:40 AM, and 4:40 AM (March 12). Coordinated with Hezbollah, which launched approximately 150 rockets at northern Israel. Khorramshahr-4 heavy ballistic missiles confirmed alongside Fattah hypersonic and Kheibar Shekan missiles. Cluster munition warheads deployed; two construction workers killed in Yehud (east of Tel Aviv) by submunitions from a cluster-equipped missile that penetrated defences. Iran also targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain and struck at Gulf state targets including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE. Israeli media reported all missiles intercepted, though cluster submunitions caused casualties on the ground.

timing.announced_utc_note: First salvo at 11:30 PM Israel time (March 11 local). Subsequent salvos at 12:50 AM, 3:40 AM, and 4:40 AM March 12 local. Per Haaretz and Times of Israel liveblog reporting.

weapons.payload: Multiple salvos of ballistic missiles including Khorramshahr-4 heavy missiles with 1.5-ton warheads, Fattah hypersonic missiles, and Kheibar Shekan missiles. Cluster munition warheads confirmed on approximately half of missiles. Coordinated with Hezbollah rockets and drones from Lebanon.

targets.targets: Central Israel from Netanya to Ashdod. Multiple salvos targeting Tel Aviv metropolitan area and surrounding cities. Also targeted US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain, and Gulf state infrastructure in Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and UAE.

interception.interception_report: Israeli media reported all ballistic missiles targeting Israel were intercepted. However, cluster submunitions from at least one missile dispersed over the Yehud area east of Tel Aviv, killing two and injuring one. Saudi Arabia intercepted 6 missiles near Prince Sultan Air Base. Kuwait shot down 8 drones. UAE intercepted drones and missiles. Bahrain activated air raid sirens.

impact.damage: Cluster submunitions from an Iranian missile struck a construction site in Yehud, east of Tel Aviv. Two construction workers killed outdoors (not in shelters) — one killed immediately, second died the following day. One worker seriously injured by shrapnel. Interceptor fragments fell in several areas across central Israel.

proxy.description: Hezbollah launched approximately 150 rockets at northern Israel in a coordinated 'joint and integrated operation' with IRGC. Hezbollah targeted over 50 sites including northern Israeli communities. Initial barrage of ~100 rockets shortly after 8 PM, with additional waves throughout the night.

events.damage_description: Cluster submunitions from a Khorramshahr-4 missile struck a construction site. Two workers killed outdoors (not in shelters), one seriously injured by shrapnel. Submunitions dispersed over approximately 10 km radius.

events.israeli_claim: All ballistic missiles intercepted; casualties caused by cluster submunitions from intercepted missile

incidents.description: Forty-third wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 13 (March 12), daytime continuation. IRGC launched Khorramshahr-4 (pinpoint, twin warhead), Qadr (multi-warhead), Emad (precision), and Kheibar Shekan ballistic missiles with a fleet of attack drones targeting the US Fifth Fleet base, other US military bases in the region, and strategic targets deep inside Tel Aviv. Dedicated to the memory of Hossein Salami and martyrs of previous campaigns. Continues the pattern of 6 salvos on March 12; sirens sounded across central Israel. No casualties reported from daytime attacks. A teenage girl in Rehovot was fatally struck by a vehicle while rushing to shelter during one of the day's attacks (sirens did not go off in her city).

timing.announced_utc_note: Approximate timing for daytime IRGC-announced wave on March 12. Exact time uncertain. ToI reported the fifth attack since midnight; two further daytime salvos after wave 42's overnight barrage.

incidents.description: Forty-fourth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 14 (March 13). IRGC targeted Kiryat Shmona, Hadera, and Haifa in northern Israel, plus the US Fifth Fleet and US bases in Bahrain and Erbil, Iraq. Also targeted Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan. Weapons included Khorramshahr-4 (heavy BM, dual/multi-warhead), Emad (one-ton warheads), Qadr, Kheibar Shekan, and attack drones. First of 7 attacks that hit Israel on March 13. Iranian media claimed a US KC-135 aerial refueling aircraft was targeted and shot down in western Iraq (unverified).

Specific targets: Haifa, Caesarea, settlements of Zar'it and Shlomi, and the Holon military-industrial complex. Also targeted US bases at Al Dhafra (UAE) and Iraqi Kurdistan. Carried out in coordination between IRGC, IRGC Navy, Iranian Army drone units, and Hezbollah. Hezbollah simultaneously launched approximately 150 rockets at northern Israel.

incidents.description: Forty-sixth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 14 (March 13), evening at 8:33 PM Israel time. IRGC launched Khorramshahr-4, Kheibar Shekan, and Emad ballistic missiles with confirmed cluster bomb warhead. Targeted seven sites in Tel Aviv, two in Rishon LeZion, and one in Shoham. Also targeted three US force commander locations including King Sultan base (Saudi Arabia), Victory base (Iraq), and a base in Iraqi Kurdistan. Cluster munition impacts: roof fire in Shoham (dozens evacuated), empty school hit and cars damaged in Rishon Lezion, highway crater in central Israel, building fire in Holon, submunition impacts at Mishmar Hashiva. IDF reported half of Iranian missiles in the war carried cluster warheads. Dedicated to martyrs Ali Rashid and Mohammad Bagheri.

timing.announced_utc_note: 8:33 PM Israel time per Times of Israel. Iran launched BM with cluster bomb warhead.

IRGC launched Kheibar Shekan solid-fuel and Qadr liquid-fuel missiles targeting the Negev Desert, Beersheba, and Nevatim airbase. Also targeted the US Al-Udeid airbase in Qatar. Sirens sounded near Beersheba at 11:13 PM Israel time, with an additional launch detected toward central Israel at 11:19 PM. Medics reported no injuries at 11:51 PM; IDF assessed a small number of missiles were intercepted or struck open areas.

incidents.description: Forty-eighth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 15 (March 14). IRGC launched solid-fuel Kheibar Shekan, liquid-fuel Qadr missiles, and attack drones targeting Israeli military sites in the Galilee, occupied Golan Heights, and Haifa, plus US military bases. Multiple salvos throughout the day (at least 5 since midnight). Major impact event: missile with fragmenting/cluster warhead struck Eilat at ~3:43 PM Israel time, causing ten impact sites — 12-year-old boy moderately injured by glass shards, 39-year-old man and one other person lightly injured by shrapnel. Central Israel: fragmenting missile hit Lod/Ness Ziona area with no injuries. Jerusalem targeted with interceptions, no casualties. Western Galilee sirens for suspected Hezbollah drone infiltration at Nahariya. Hezbollah claimed targeting settlements in Gronot HaGalil and Israeli air defense system in Ma'alot-Tarshiha. Coordinated with Hezbollah.

timing.announced_utc_note: 3:43 PM Israel time for the Eilat strike — most significant impact event of the day. Multiple salvos occurred since midnight. IDF detected another BM launch at 4:27 PM. Sirens in central/south at ~2:51 PM.

Central Israel: fragmenting missile at Lod/Ness Ziona, damage but no injuries. Jerusalem: intercepted, no damage. Western Galilee: Hezbollah drone/rocket alerts at Nahariya.

incidents.description: Sixtieth wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Afternoon missile barrage targeting central Israel and Jerusalem area. Shrapnel from interceptions fell near the Knesset, the National Library, and the Church of the Holy Sepulchre in Jerusalem. A large intercepted missile chunk damaged a home in East Jerusalem. Israel Fire and Rescue Authority reported 10 locations damaged by intercepted missile shrapnel or cluster munitions — seven in Rishon Lezion, with additional impacts in Lod, Shoham, and along Highway 431. Interceptor debris fell in Safed, northern Israel, initially suspected of leaking hazardous material but later ruled out by the Environmental Protection Ministry. Day 17 aggregate: Health Ministry reported 142 injured over 24 hours — 3 in moderate condition, 134 in good condition, 5 treated for anxiety. IDF launched extensive counterstrikes on Iranian targets in Tehran, Shiraz, and Tabriz simultaneously.

impact.damage: 10 locations damaged across central Israel — 7 in Rishon Lezion, plus Lod, Shoham, Highway 431. Shrapnel near Knesset, National Library, and Church of the Holy Sepulchre in Jerusalem. Large intercepted missile chunk damaged a home in East Jerusalem. Interceptor fell in Safed (hazmat risk ruled out). Day 17 aggregate: Health Ministry reported 142 injured over 24 hours (3 moderate, 134 good condition, 5 anxiety). IDF launched extensive counterstrikes on Iranian targets in Tehran, Shiraz, and Tabriz.

incidents.description: Sixty-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 17 (March 16). Combined attack targeting UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and Iraq. UAE air defenses intercepted 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones launched from Iran. A drone attack caused a fire at the Fujairah petroleum industrial zone, forcing suspension of oil loading operations. One Palestinian civilian killed in Abu Dhabi (Al Bahyah area) when a missile struck their car. Qatar armed forces intercepted two waves of Iranian missiles over Doha. Saudi Arabia intercepted 64 drones — 61 aimed at Eastern Province and 3 over Riyadh. In Iraq, air defenses intercepted a drone near the US embassy in Baghdad; one federal police officer and two PMF members injured at Jurf al-Sakhar south of Baghdad.

timing.announced_utc_note: Approximate timing based on reporting sequence. UAE interceptions announced afternoon local time (~14:24 UTC per Gulf News timestamps). Qatar interceptions at ~12:30 and ~13:00 UTC. Saudi interceptions from morning through early afternoon.
timing.announcement_source: UAE MOD / Qatar MOD / Saudi MOD / Gulf News / Al Jazeera

weapons.payload: Ballistic missiles and drones. 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones intercepted by UAE. 64 drones intercepted by Saudi Arabia. Two waves of missiles at Qatar. Drone near US embassy in Baghdad.

targets.targets: UAE: 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones intercepted. Fujairah petroleum industrial zone hit by drone (fire, oil loading suspended). Abu Dhabi Al Bahyah area (1 civilian killed by missile strike on car). Qatar: two waves of missiles intercepted over Doha (~12:30 and 13:00 UTC). Saudi Arabia: 64 drones intercepted (61 Eastern Province, 3 Riyadh). Iraq: drone near US embassy Baghdad intercepted; Jurf al-Sakhar attack (1 federal police officer, 2 PMF members injured).

launch_site.description: IRGC missile and drone launch sites in Iran

interception.interception_report: UAE intercepted 6 ballistic missiles and 21 drones. Saudi Arabia intercepted 64 drones (61 Eastern Province, 3 Riyadh). Qatar intercepted two waves of missiles. Iraqi air defenses intercepted a drone near the US embassy in Baghdad. Despite interceptions, Fujairah port and Abu Dhabi were hit.

impact.damage: Fujairah petroleum industrial zone: fire ignited, oil loading operations suspended. Abu Dhabi Al Bahyah: missile struck a car, killing one civilian. Jurf al-Sakhar (Iraq): injuries to security forces.

incidents.description: Seventy-first wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 18 (March 17). Drone and rocket attack on US Embassy compound in Baghdad Green Zone. Most intense assault on the embassy since TP4 began. At least five drones involved; one drone landed near the embassy with smoke rising from the compound. incidents.description: Seventy-second wave of Operation True Promise 4. Day 18 (March 17). Iranian drone and missile attack on UAE. UAE intercepted 10 ballistic missiles and 45 drones. Fire broke out in Fujairah Oil Industry Zone from drone strike. Tanker hit near Fujairah. Pakistani national killed by falling shrapnel in Abu Dhabi (Bani Yas). Dubai airspace briefly shut.

timing.announced_utc_note: Estimated early morning UAE time (~05:00 UTC). Large-scale Iranian attack on UAE. 10 BMs and 45 drones intercepted. Fujairah energy zone fire.

weapons.payload: 10 ballistic missiles and 45+ drones targeting UAE. Shahed-136, Shahed-107, and Shahed-238 identified.

targets.targets: UAE. Fujairah Oil Industry Zone fire. Tanker hit near Fujairah. Pakistani national killed by shrapnel in Abu Dhabi. Dubai airspace briefly shut.

launch_site.description: IRGC launch sites in southern Iran

interception.interception_report: UAE claimed over 90% interception rate. 10 BMs and 45 drones intercepted. Some penetrated causing Fujairah fire and Abu Dhabi shrapnel casualty.

impact.damage: Fire in Fujairah Oil Industry Zone. Tanker structural damage near Fujairah. Falling shrapnel killed Pakistani national in Abu Dhabi.
